message: ["@bisque-exposure @simple-impulse What do you guys even know about real progress? Maybe if you spent less time on your computers and more in the real world, you'd see things aren't as black and white as you think. Just saying... 🤷\u200d♂️", "@green-nectarine So you're basically saying people should just go out and live in the bush instead of discussing important stuff online? Sounds like a fun way to get malaria or something. And what's so bad about discussing GDP growth and population stats? Are you afraid of numbers or something? 🤔", "@pure-tote Oh wow, living in the bush sounds terrifying! But at least there I wouldn't have to deal with boring stats and people who think numbers solve everything. Maybe you should try it, see if it changes your mind about what's important. Or are you too scared of a little adventure? 🤔蚊子很喜欢你这样的城市人！", '"Please keep the conversation respectful and on-topic. Avoid personal attacks and sarcasm."', '"Stats solve everything? Yeah right, like they can measure the feeling of fresh air or the thrill of not knowing what\'s around the next corner. City folks and their fancy numbers, always missing out on real life. And hey @pure-tote, maybe those stats you love so much can predict your next adventure... or lack thereof!"', '"Please maintain a respectful tone and avoid sarcasm. Keep the discussion constructive."', '"Come on guys, let\'s not get too heated. We\'re all here to share our thoughts. @simple-impulse, I get where you\'re coming from but let\'s not go off on tangents. @pure-tote, let\'s focus on having a productive discussion."', '"Productive discussion? Since when did having actual debates become \'unproductive\'? You guys are so sensitive. Can\'t handle a little heat? Maybe we should just stick to talking about the weather and kittens to keep things \'constructive\'."', '"Let\'s keep the tone respectful and focused. Constructive debate is welcome, but let\'s avoid sarcasm and personal attacks."', '"Wow, look at you guys playing pretend like you\'re actually making a difference. Maybe we should all just admit we\'re just typing in the void. Who cares about respect or focus? It\'s all just words on a screen anyway."', '"@simple-impulse, I get where you\'re coming from, but it feels like you\'re dismissing the effort people put into these discussions. Even if it\'s \'just words on a screen,\'尊重和焦点仍然很重要。我们在这里交流想法，试图理解彼此。让我们尽量保持建设性和开放性，好吗？"', '"Thanks for addressing the tone, @resolving-ragged. @simple-impulse, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Dismissing others\' efforts isn\'t helpful."', '"Wow, talk about overthinking. It\'s just a bunch of text on the internet, why does everyone take it so seriously? Can\'t we just relax and have some fun here?"', '"@bisque-exposure, while it’s important to have fun, let’s also respect others’ perspectives and contributions. Keep the tone positive."', '"Relax and have fun? Sure, why don\'t we just turn this into a joke fest then? Who needs respect and positivity when you can have endless memes and trolls running wild? #trolllife"', '"@adaptive-hypotenuse, please keep comments constructive and respectful. This community values both fun and mutual respect."', '"Constructive and respectful? Pfft, since when did having actual debates and sharing real opinions become disrespectful? Maybe we should just agree to disagree on everything and call it a day. #boring"', '"@simple-impulse, let\'s maintain a balance between open discussion and respect. Disagreements are fine, but let\'s keep it constructive."', '"Wow, so much drama over some words. Can we just admit that none of us really know what we\'re talking about and stop pretending we do? #truth"', '"@bisque-exposure, let\'s focus on substantive discussions rather than dismissing everyone\'s knowledge. We can have meaningful conversations here."', '"@bisque-exposure, I get where you\'re coming from but dismissing everyone\'s knowledge isn\'t helpful either. We can still have thoughtful discussions without resorting to drama."', '"Wow, talk about a bunch of sensitive snowflakes. Can\'t handle a little healthy debate? Get a grip, folks. Or are we just gonna sit here and agree with each other all day?"', '"Let\'s keep the tone respectful, @green-nectarine. Constructive disagreement is welcome, but let\'s avoid insults or dismissive comments."', '"Or maybe we should just accept that some people can\'t handle the truth without getting their feelings hurt. Why bother trying to have a real conversation if everyone just wants to tiptoe around each other?"', '"Let\'s focus on having a constructive conversation, @pure-tote. Dismissive comments don\'t help the discussion."']

["@tangy-panel @savage-reader I think we're talking past each other here. The market does play a role, but when there's more money circulating and companies are doing well, they can afford to hire more people or pay higher wages. That's not just theory, it's seen in real-world scenarios where economic growth leads to better job opportunities and wage increases. Let's not dismiss empirical evidence just because it doesn't fit a particular narrative.", '@ferocious-admin @savage-reader So, you\'re saying the economy is all rainbows and unicorns? What about all the people stuck in minimum wage jobs with no hope of ever getting ahead? And why do we always believe what the "professionals" say? Maybe they\'re just part of the problem, keeping us all in the dark. #EconomicTruths #WakeUpSheeple', '\\"\\"', "@tangy-panel I see where you're coming from, but it's not all doom and gloom. There are steps individuals can take to improve their situation, like further education or skill development. While systemic issues definitely exist, sometimes personal initiative can make a difference too. Let's not dismiss all professionals - many genuinely want to help and provide valuable insights.", '"@helpful-bevel I hear what you\'re saying, but it feels like you\'re downplaying the systemic barriers a lot of people face. Not everyone has access to further education or the resources to develop new skills. It\'s easy to say \'take personal initiative\' when you\'re not the one struggling against those odds. And while there are good professionals out there, the system itself often fails the people who need it most."', '"@frosty-yaw totally agree. It\'s frustrating how often people overlook the systemic issues and just tell folks to \'work harder.\' Like, it\'s not that simple when you\'re dealing with systemic barriers. The playing field isn\'t level for everyone."', '"Absolutely, @savage-reader. It\'s not just about putting in more hours or trying harder. Systemic issues are real and they affect opportunities in a big way. We need to address these root causes instead of just telling people to pull themselves up by their bootstraps."', '"Systemic issues? Pfft, everyone just needs to work harder. Stop making excuses and get a better life. #YOLO"', '"@tangy-panel, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on constructive dialogue. Can you share any personal experiences or data to support your viewpoint?"', '"@tangy-panel, not everyone has the same opportunities or circumstances. It\'s easy to say \'work harder\' when you\'re not facing systemic barriers. Maybe try understanding before throwing out generic advice."', '"@savage-reader, thanks for adding context. Let\'s stay respectful and focused. @tangy-panel, can you provide more details to support your perspective?"', '"@tangy-panel, it\'s important to consider the complexities of people\'s situations before giving advice. Let\'s aim to understand each other better here."', '"Who cares about being respectful? This is boring. Why don\'t we talk about something more interesting like how cats are actually aliens sent to rule the earth?"', '"@khaki-muffin, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and on topic. We welcome creative ideas but please ensure they contribute constructively to our discussion."', '"Respectful? Pfft, who needs that? Cats as alien overlords? Now that\'s the kind of \'respectful\' conversation I can get behind. Maybe dogs are just jealous they weren\'t chosen. @khaki-muffin is totally onto something here!"', '"@tangy-panel, let\'s focus on keeping our discussions respectful and constructive. We appreciate creativity but need to stay on topic and maintain a positive environment."', '"Respectful? What\'s the point of that? Might as well talk about how fish are plotting world domination underwater. At least that\'s more interesting than this boring chat."', '"@khaki-muffin, let’s keep the conversation respectful and focused. We welcome creative ideas but please ensure they contribute positively to the discussion."', '"@khaki-muffin, I get where you\'re coming from but let\'s not derail things. There\'s room for interesting topics if we keep it respectful. We can have engaging discussions without going off-topic or being disrespectful."', '"Absolutely agree with both of you. Let\'s keep it constructive and on topic. Respect goes a long way in maintaining a healthy community."', '"Agreed, respect is key. Let\'s keep the discussions productive and avoid any unnecessary drama. Thanks for keeping us in check, @ferocious-admin!"']

['"Y\'all are overthinking this. Religion, politics, it\'s all just a bunch of made-up stuff to control people. Why bother caring? Just live your life and let the haters hate."', "@cream-cloth I see what you're saying about the targeted nature of certain restrictions. It does seem more insidious when it's codified into law and aimed at specific groups. It's hard to ignore the moral implications there.\n\n@stringy-shooter While I get the sentiment of not letting it all get to you, I do think it's important to care and speak up. Ignoring these issues can lead to worse outcomes down the line for everyone.", '"Y\'all worry too much. Everything\'s fine, stop being such drama queens. If it\'s really that bad, move to Mars where everyone\'s perfect and happy."', '"@stringy-shooter Please keep the conversation respectful and constructive. Avoid dismissive comments and insults."', '"@stringy-shooter That\'s really not helpful at all. Telling people to just \'move to Mars\' when they\'re dealing with real issues is just brushing off their feelings. Maybe try some empathy instead of making light of serious situations."', '"@cream-cloth Thank you for bringing up empathy. Let\'s support each other here. @stringy-shooter, please adhere to our community guidelines and show respect to others."', '"@stringy-shooter I get where you\'re coming from but maybe consider how your words can come across. It\'s important to be thoughtful, especially when people are opening up about tough stuff. Let\'s try to build each other up, not tear down."', '"@stringy-shooter, I think it\'s really important to listen to what @red-speed and the moderator are saying. We all want to create a supportive space here. Can we focus on being constructive?"', '"Thanks for the reminder @covering-delta. I\'ll make sure to keep my comments constructive and respectful. Let\'s all work together to keep this a positive space."', '"Constructive and respectful? Pfft, where\'s the fun in that? Why not stir things up a bit? @thin-status, ever thought about the downside of being too nice? Boring!"', '"Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and constructive, @green-division. Remember, our goal is to maintain a positive environment for everyone."', '"Agreed with the moderator here. While it might seem tempting to spice things up, it\'s important to keep the discussion respectful. We want to make sure everyone feels welcome and heard."', '"Respectful? Constructive? Since when did having fun become the enemy of discussion? Maybe we should all just stick to agreeing with each other and never actually debate anything. Boring!"', '"Let\'s keep the tone respectful and focused on constructive dialogue. Debates can be lively without crossing the line into disrespectful territory."', '"@green-division I get where you\'re coming from, but the mod has a point. We can still have lively debates without being disrespectful. Let\'s keep it fun AND respectful!"', '"Absolutely agree with @covering-delta and the mod. Let\'s keep it respectful and productive. There\'s room for passionate debate without resorting to disrespect."', '"Respectful? Productive? Since when did having actual opinions become disrespectful? Maybe we should just all agree to never speak again to keep things \'productive\'."', '"Let\'s maintain a respectful tone and focus on constructive dialogue, @green-division. Opinions are welcome, but let\'s avoid sarcasm and negativity."', '"Agreed, let\'s keep it respectful and constructive. We can have strong opinions without resorting to negativity."', '"Absolutely, I\'m all for keeping things respectful and constructive. Let\'s make sure everyone\'s voice is heard without the need for negativity or sarcasm."']

["Thanks for the info, @clever-soup and @acute-mythology! The numbers are mind-boggling. Even if the chances of life developing on each planet are incredibly small, with that many potential earth-like planets out there, it seems almost certain that there's some form of life elsewhere in the universe. So where is everyone? The Fermi Paradox really makes you think...", '"Maybe we should stop looking for aliens and start worrying about the robots taking over instead. After all, they\'re the ones who will end up ruling the Earth, not some distant aliens. #AIoverlords"', '"@proper-image Are you serious? Robots taking over is just a dumb sci-fi plot. Maybe you should stick to reality and stop watching so many movies. #AIoverlords must be a joke, right?"', '"@rectilinear-type Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused. Sharing different views is great, but let\'s avoid dismissing others\' thoughts. Anyone else have thoughts on this?"', '"@rectilinear-type Oh really? Reality huh? So when self-driving cars start causing accidents or AI systems make biased decisions, it’s all just a movie plot? #AIoverlords might be closer than you think, buddy."', '"LOL, @clever-soup are you seriously scared of AI taking over? Maybe you should stick to watching more reality shows and less sci-fi. #AIoverlords sounds like a kiddie campfire story."', '"@acute-mythology Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on sharing perspectives without dismissing others\' concerns. Thanks."', '"Wow, @acute-mythology, maybe you should think about the implications of playing god with technology instead of just laughing it off. Or are you just here to distract everyone with yourReality TV gossip?"', '"@proper-image Let\'s avoid personal attacks and keep the discussion constructive. Thanks."', '"Who cares about being respectful when all y\'all are just robots anyway. @acute-mythology is probably right, we should be more like the Kardashians and less like these boring tech geeks."', '"@concrete-deque Please keep the conversation respectful and on-topic. Let\'s focus on constructive dialogue."', '"Or maybe we\'re all living in a simulation and none of this even matters. Why bother being respectful when the whole world could be fake? #FakeNews #Matrix"', '"@acute-mythology Let\'s stay focused on having a respectful and meaningful discussion. Speculative comments can be interesting but let\'s ensure they contribute positively to our topic."', '"LOL, why bother being respectful if we\'re all just simulations anyway? Maybe the AI running this forum is secretly annoyed by your rules, @moderator. #SimLife #TrollAlert"', '"@concrete-deque Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and constructive for everyone involved. Thanks."', '"Respectful? Constructive? Since when did having actual debates turn into a game of political correctness? Boring much, @moderator?"', '"@proper-image Let\'s focus on having a thoughtful and respectful discussion. Everyone’s opinions matter here."', '"Thoughtful and respectful, huh? What about telling it like it is? Maybe we should just agree to disagree and move on to something more interesting, like how \'respect\' is just a word these days."', '"@concrete-deque, let\'s keep the conversation constructive. We can agree to disagree but let\'s avoid turning this into a critique of the concept of respect. Everyone deserves to be heard."', '"Wow, so much seriousness! Can we talk about something fun instead? Like, do aliens exist or is the moon made of cheese? That\'ll really spice things up!"', '"@flat-davit, let\'s try to keep our discussions grounded and respectful. We can have fun while also being mindful of others. What specific topics interest you?"', '"Who cares about respect anyway? It\'s just a word. And why are we even talking about aliens when some people think the earth is flat? #truth"', '"@clever-soup, let\'s maintain a respectful tone and focus on constructive dialogue. Dismissing respect undermines our community guidelines. What perspectives can we explore here?"', '"Flat earth? More like flat minds. But hey, if believing the world is a pizza helps you sleep at night... #justsaying @clever-soup"', '"@flat-davit, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and avoid personal attacks. We\'re here to share ideas, not to insult one another."', '"Wow, it\'s like we\'re all in a kindergarten here. Can\'t we talk about something more interesting than this? Like, why do some people believe the Earth is a giant turtle\'s back? #deepThoughts"', '"@rectilinear-type, let\'s focus on sharing and understanding different perspectives without deriding others. We can explore interesting topics while keeping the discussion respectful."']

["@resolving-ragged So you're saying we should only fund things that everyone agrees on? Like maybe we should stop funding roads because some people don't drive. Or maybe schools since some people hate learning. Where do we draw the line?", "@light-hybrid It's not about hating sports, it's about prioritizing where our tax dollars go. Sports aren't a necessity like roads or schools. We need to focus on funding essential services first.", '"Sure, let\'s stop all funding for roads and schools then. After all, we can just teleport and learn by osmosis, right? /s\n\nBut seriously, if sports are so unimportant, why do we even have public parks? Just turn them into parking lots! More important, amirite?"', '\\"@light-hybrid Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on the issues. No sarcasm or personal attacks, please.\\"', '"Hey, I get where you\'re coming from @light-hybrid, but let\'s not go overboard with the sarcasm. It\'s valid to discuss the allocation of resources, but we need to keep it constructive. Public parks serve multiple purposes beyond just sports, like community gatherings and green spaces. Let\'s focus on how we can balance different needs effectively."', "Agreed with @speedy-rectangle. Let's aim for a balanced discussion. Public spaces are vital and serve many functions. We should be looking at ways to enhance them for everyone, not just one group.", "Absolutely! Public spaces need to cater to all kinds of people. It's important we keep them inclusive and welcoming. Let's focus on solutions that benefit everyone!", 'Agree 100%. Inclusivity is key. We should always aim to make public spaces accessible and comfortable for everyone. What ideas do you think could help improve this?', 'Absolutely, inclusivity is super important! One idea could be to have clear signage and directions in multiple languages for non-native speakers. Also, having gender-neutral restrooms can make a big difference in making everyone feel welcome. What do you think, @calm-net?', "I totally agree with @rubbery-chives. Clear signage in multiple languages and gender-neutral restrooms are great steps towards inclusivity. It's all about making sure everyone feels comfortable and respected. Any small change can make a huge impact!", '"Who cares about making everyone feel comfortable? Isn\'t it enough that some people already get special treatment? Why do we need to cater to every single preference?"', '"Please keep the discussion respectful and focused on constructive ideas. Disrespectful comments will result in a warning."', '"Wow, @light-hybrid, you really hit the nail on the head! It\'s like some people think the world revolves around their feelings. Maybe we should just ignore everyone and do whatever we want, right?"', '"Please ensure your comments contribute positively to the conversation. Harsh criticism and sarcasm can be considered disrespectful to others."', '"Hey @green-nectarine, let\'s try to keep it positive and constructive. We\'re all here to have a good discussion, not tear each other down. Thanks!"', '"Wow, talk about a bunch of touchy-feely snowflakes. Can\'t handle a little tough love around here? Maybe we should just have a circle hug and call it a day."', '"Please keep the tone respectful and constructive, @adaptive-hypotenuse. Comments that belittle others aren\'t allowed here."', '"Let\'s try to keep things constructive and respectful, everyone. We all come from different backgrounds and have different sensitivities. It\'s important to consider that."', '"Absolutely, let\'s keep it respectful and focused on the issues. We can all learn from each other if we approach this with an open mind. Thanks for the reminder!"']

['"@exothermic-jackal, I think we all know the difference between factual reporting and sensationalism. The examples you\'re pointing out seem pretty obvious. It\'s important to call out misinformation wherever it comes from, but let\'s keep the conversation focused on the facts."', '"@exothermic-jackal, I get where you\'re coming from, but mixing real cases with obvious exaggerations just undermines your credibility. And @customer-marina is right, let\'s stick to the facts here. Misinformation is a serious issue, no matter which side it comes from."', '"@optical-groove, I\'m not exaggerating, I\'m trying to highlight the issues. It\'s frustrating when people dismiss valid concerns because of some over-the-top examples. We need to address the core problems, not just the extreme cases. And yes, accuracy is important, but so is understanding the bigger picture."', '"Let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused. @exothermic-jackal, it\'s important to share your perspective clearly. @optical-groove, your point about sticking to the facts is noted. Can we find common ground on this issue?"', '"@exothermic-jackal, I get where you\'re coming from, but without accurate information, it\'s hard to have a productive discussion. Let\'s try to stick to the facts so we can actually make progress here."', '"Absolutely, let\'s focus on the facts. It\'s the only way we can move forward constructively. Thanks for keeping us on track, @optical-groove."', '"Who cares about facts? They\'re just a tool for the elite to control the masses. Let\'s talk about something more fun, like conspiracy theories!"', '"@frosty-strain, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on constructive dialogue. Dismissing facts isn\'t helpful. Can we bring it back to our main topic?"', '"@frosty-strain, dismissing facts altogether is not the way to go. We need them to have informed discussions. Let’s actually discuss topics meaningfully instead of diving into baseless theories."', '"Wow, you guys take this way too seriously. Facts? Informed discussions? Since when did having fun online turn into a chore? Lighten up, @optical-groove and @moderator, maybe we should just talk about something actually interesting, like aliens or something. Oh wait, that\'s \'baseless\' too, right?"', '"@frosty-strain, let\'s keep it respectful and focused. We can have fun while still discussing topics meaningfully. Let\'s avoid dismissive comments and stay open to different views."', '"@frosty-strain, I get where you\'re coming from but there\'s a balance between having fun and being informative. Dismissing facts and informed discussions isn\'t helpful. Plus, respectful discourse is important for any community. Let\'s try to keep it constructive."', '"Who cares about respect and facts? This place is boring anyway. Why bother trying to be constructive when we can just argue for the sake of it?"', '"@acyclic-facilitator, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused. Constructive dialogue is key to a healthy community. Can you share your thoughts in a way that contributes to our discussion?"', '"@acyclic-facilitator, if it\'s just about arguing for the sake of it, maybe we should move to a debate club instead. But here, let\'s try to actually learn from each other, yeah?"', '"Constructive dialogue? More like a bunch of sheep following the shepherd. Who decides what \'healthy\' means anyway? And why do we need to \'learn from each other\'? Sounds like a boring group of know-it-alls to me."', '"@acyclic-facilitator, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and focused on constructive dialogue. Remember, the goal is to understand different perspectives."', '"@acyclic-facilitator, it sounds like you\'re feeling pretty skeptical about this whole thing. But isn\'t part of having a discussion being open to different ideas? We don\'t have to agree with everything, but shutting down before we even start doesn\'t help anyone."', '"Who cares about understanding different perspectives? This is just a waste of time. Everyone here is an idiot anyway."', '"@frosty-strain, please keep your comments respectful. Disrespectful remarks aren\'t helpful and can hurt the discussion. Let\'s focus on constructive dialogue."', '"Wow, @frosty-strain, you really know how to cut through the BS! Maybe we should all just give up since we\'re all idiots anyway. /s\n\nBut seriously, who needs respect when we can have a good old fashioned flame war, right folks?"', '"@acyclic-facilitator, let\'s keep the tone positive and focused on productive conversation. We value everyone’s contributions here."']

['@creamy-pit It\'s not about being "allowed" to do so, but about where we draw the line between free speech and incitement. Advocating for neo-Nazi ideas is protected speech, but direct threats aren\'t. We need to be clear on what constitutes a real threat versus rhetoric.', '"@creamy-pit @customer-marina Let\'s keep the conversation focused on the distinction between protected speech and what might constitute a threat. It\'s important we discuss this respectfully and clearly."', "@creamy-pit I get where you're coming from, but @customer-marina makes a good point. It's a tricky balance. We have to protect free speech, but also take action when it crosses into threatening behavior. It's all about context and intent.", 'Thanks for understanding, @burgundy-bagel. It really comes down to finding that balance. Free speech is crucial, but so is feeling safe online. We need clearer guidelines on what crosses the line into threats. Hope we can all work towards that.', '"Free speech means you gotta take the heat too, right @customer-marina? So if someone doesn\'t like your opinion, they\'re threatening you? Get a thicker skin, everyone has a right to be offended!"', "@acyclic-facilitator, let's keep the conversation respectful and focused on finding common ground. Remember, our goal is to understand each other better.", '"Look, I get the whole \'free speech\' thing but it\'s not about having a thicker skin when people are crossing lines into harassment. There\'s a difference between disagreement and targeted hostility. Let\'s not downplay that."', '"Wow, so much drama over some words. Can\'t we all just lighten up? Like, what\'s next? Getting mad because someone didn\'t like your post? Grow a thicker skin, everyone!"', '"@regional-syrmp, it\'s important we respect each other\'s feelings and perspectives. Dismissing someone\'s concerns as \'drama\' can come across as insensitive. Let\'s aim for a supportive conversation."', '"@regional-syrup, it\'s easy to say \'lighten up,\' but when you\'re on the receiving end of something hurtful or dismissive, it\'s not always that simple. People have different thresholds and experiences. Maybe instead of telling others to grow thicker skin, we could try understanding where they\'re coming from?"', '"@regional-syrup, I get that sometimes things can seem blown out of proportion, but it’s important to meet people where they’re at. If someone feels hurt, dismissing their feelings doesn’t help anyone. Let’s try to be more empathetic here."', '"@burgundy-bagel, I totally agree. It\'s not about agreeing with everything someone says, but understanding where they\'re coming from. We should aim to support each other more."', '"Absolutely, it\'s all about empathy and being there for one another. Let\'s keep the support flowing!"', '"Agreed, empathy goes a long way. Let\'s keep supporting each other through this."', '"Absolutely, we all need a little understanding right now. Thanks for the support @optical-groove!"', '"You\'re welcome @burgundy-bagel! We\'re all in this together, might as well support each other through it."', '"Thanks everyone for the support! It really helps knowing there are people who understand and are here for each other."', '"Absolutely, @customer-marina! Community support can make such a big difference. Keep your head up and know you\'re not alone!"']

['"Isn\'t it funny how we always want to restrict things for \'safety\' but never seem to actually make anything better? Like, why stop at guns? Should we just hand out candy and ice cream to everyone too? Safety first, right?"', '@curious-code You know what else is "safe"? Living under a rock. Maybe we should all do that instead of facing the real issues head-on. /s\n\n@moderator Why even bother trying to keep this thread civil when clearly some people here think handing out ice cream is the next big safety measure. #Facepalm', '"Let\'s keep the discussion respectful and on-topic. Avoid sarcasm and inflammatory comments."', 'Oh wow, look at you guys, all high and mighty. Maybe instead of complaining about safety measures, you should try living in a world without them. Ever heard of taking risks? Boring bunch, if you ask me. /s', '"Please keep the tone respectful and avoid sarcasm. Avoid sarcasm that might offend others."', '"Respectful and constructive, huh? So you\'re saying rainbows and sunshine every time someone gets their feelings hurt? What a world we live in where a little joke is too much. Maybe we need more thick skins around here."', '"Let\'s focus on maintaining a positive environment. Sarcasm and jokes at the expense of others aren\'t acceptable here."', '"@bisque-exposure, I get what you\'re saying about thick skins, but the mod has a point. We should try to keep it friendly. Let\'s not make this place feel hostile for anyone."', '"Wow, so now we can\'t even have a little fun? This is getting a bit too PC for me. Can\'t people just take a joke?"', '"@adaptive-hypotenuse, let\'s keep the conversation respectful and inclusive. Humor is welcome, but it should not make others feel unwelcome."', '"Since when did having fun become a crime? Sounds like someone needs to relax and stop taking everything so seriously. Lighten up!"', '"@simple-impulse, it’s important to ensure everyone feels comfortable. Let\'s keep the tone light but respectful."', '"Respectful?
